channel.title: Experience on Sharad Raj
channel.description: Recent content in Experience on Sharad Raj

item.title: Lead AI Engineer
item.description: Promoted to Lead AI Engineer; led the scaling and optimization of AI solutions and backend systems for Generative AI products, building agentic workflows (Agentic Architecture, AI Agents, LangGraph, MCP) with an emphasis on ethical, human-centered AI at scale.

item.title: AI Engineer
item.description:
AI Engineer focused on building and scaling GenAI solutions with emphasis on production-ready systems and MLOps practices.

  • Developed agentic AI systems and RAG pipelines for enterprise applications
  • Implemented CI/CD workflows and containerized deployments
  • Optimized LLM integrations and backend infrastructure

item.title: Software Developer
item.description: Deployed the “Adarsh Champawat Geospatial Dashboard” for Champawat District, Uttarakhand; led Web GIS dashboards integrated with AI/ML (LLMs + RAG) to optimize data processing and user interactions using GIS/Web GIS approaches.
